description: These slip-on heels from catwalk are perfect for party wear &ndash the multi-coloured glitter on the straps will complement any party dress or ethnic party ensemble. Pop these on to jazz up your outfit when you're dressing to impress. Heel: 3&rdquo Upper Glitter covered strap covering the forefoot and extending on the sides to the heel collar for a snug Fit and great visual appeal Ankle strap is elasticated for comfort Shiny silver sole for added style Brand embossed on the footbed Outsole TRP outsole with high-shine heel Sandal Care Wipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dust Do not use a drier or store in direct sunlight
